rulings.Case Title: MELINDA B. CORTEZ et al VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Demurrer To Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012, line 8. Defendants' Demurrer To Third Amended Complaint. Sustain without leave to amend 1st cause of action, ID theft always speculative and 2nd cause of action Breach of Contract failed to amend. Sustain with leave to amend 4th cause of action Promissory Estoppel to address typo. Overrule 3rd cause of action for Negligence Allegation for failure to protect ID information sufficient. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEBRA FUTORIAN VS. DAN WALDMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs DAN WALDMAN, REGINA WALDMAN, SERGE BERGUIG, MAUD BERGUIG, and POWELL STREET INVESTORS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Continued to Januray 9, 2013, on court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ALBERT JOHNSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT ALBERT JOHNSON's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Grant - Subject to 1) Proof of service; 2) Opposition filed; 3) Post rent. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. SEPA WONGSEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT SEPA WONGSEE's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES VS. FIROZE SETHNA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Relief From Forfeiture Under Ccp 1179
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT SAMANTHA SETHNA's Motion For Relief From Forfeiture Under Ccp 1179. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT ALIZA SINYAK's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Grant, subject to opposition and post rent. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. AUSTIN J THOMPSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012, line 6. PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant Motion for Summary Judgment. Burden shifted and opposing party presented no competent evidence to create triable issue of material fact. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESCALADE CAPITAL GROUP, LLC et al VS. RYAN BENTHEM et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012, line 11. DEFENDANT RYAN BENTHAM's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Off Calendar. Moving party has failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and failed to comply with prior instructions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL SULLIVAN VS. WILLIAM MARK AMBRUNN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT BILL AMBRUNN's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Off Calendar, untimely filed December 3rd and noticed for December 12th, CCP 1005. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARGUERITE MOORE VS. NATALIE ASSAYAG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANT NATALIE ASSAYAG's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Deny, five days to plead. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2012, line 9. DEFENDANT DEBORAH HERBSTREIT's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Deny, five days to plead. = (501/REQ)
